provenance.notes: fern_02 2K GLB staged under source/polyhaven-fern-02 (diff/nor/arm). Real LOD0 mesh near; flattens to a card past a few metres.

lod.label: mesh-near+card-far
lod.rationale: An understory fern reads as real 3D fronds up close (cheap mesh, a few hundred tris) but is indistinguishable from a single alpha card past ~12m, so the far band is a ground card — no impostor needed.

bands.notes: Normalize fern_02 GLB (axis/pivot/scale) + weld; target <800 tris.
Bake a single front-view alpha card from the normalized mesh.
